signals.headline: Russia Declares Temporary Ukraine Ceasefire | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia Declares Temporary Ukraine Ceasefire | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Putin announced a 32-hour unilateral ceasefire in Ukraine from 4 PM April 11 to end of April 12, 2026, for Orthodox Easter, following Ukraine's prior proposal; Zelenskyy responded cautiously with readiness for mirror steps.[1][4][5]

signals.headline: Solana Faces $280M+ Drift Protocol Exploit via Social Engineering | NO | HIGH confidence[3]**
signals.raw:
Solana Faces $280M+ Drift Protocol Exploit via Social Engineering | NO | HIGH confidence[3]**  
A $280M+ exploit on Drift protocol used social engineering for admin control, with Circle declining to freeze $230M+ USDC; SOL dropped 13% to test $75-$80 support, DEX volumes down 40%[3]. This confirmed incident erodes ecosystem trust and may move markets betting on Solana security or price floors.

No

signals.headline: Ternuvate Liberated by Ukraine | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ternuvate Liberated by Ukraine | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ukrainian Defense Forces have cleared Ternuvate village in Zaporizhzhia region of Russian forces, with video evidence showing troops near the village stele holding the national flag, confirming control as stated by analyst Kovalenko.[6]
